gist.headline: Sign on the dotted line
gist.blurb: Onyx Sign just landed in the app showcase. Turn AI-generated minimalist signatures into handwriting-ready vector files, because sometimes you need a robot to forge your autograph.
gist.summary: Onyx Sign has been added to the Pollinations app ecosystem, providing a tool to generate minimalist 2D signatures and export them as handwriting-ready vector files.
gist.impact: Creators can now seamlessly convert AI-designed signatures into physical handwriting formats for their projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a tiny quill or fountain pen, signing a digital document on a glowing tablet or parchment. The Monitor Robot is holding the paper, displaying a minimalist signature. Soft lime green and pastel background.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a pixelated quill pen and signing a glowing digital parchment. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head holds the document, its screen showing a minimalist signature. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
